testcase.name: test_user_profile

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'dipali@clubconcierge.in' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb604ec2d340>('email') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb604ec2d340> = {'mira_access': {'allowed': True, 'limit': 3, 'message': None, 'priority': False, ...}, 'user': {'chat_count_today': 0, 'created_at': '2026-01-20T18:48:19.743587+00:00', 'email': 'dipali@clubconcierge.in', 'id': 'a152181a-2f81-4323-845e-2b5146906fe9', ...}}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_pet_life_pass.py:91: in test_user_profile assert data.get("email") == TEST_EMAIL E AssertionError: assert None == 'dipali@clubconcierge.in' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb604ec2d340>('email') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb604ec2d340> = {'mira_access': {'allowed': True, 'limit': 3, 'message': None, 'priority': False, ...}, 'user': {'chat_count_today': 0, 'created_at': '2026-01-20T18:48:19.743587+00:00', 'email': 'dipali@clubconcierge.in', 'id': 'a152181a-2f81-4323-845e-2b5146906fe9', ...}}.get
